referral_messaging.personal_invite_template: Hey! I've been using this free app called Quantum Reality Codes — you write structured intentions and it encodes them into a 6-digit vibrational code. Then you meditate on the code. Sounds unusual but I've been getting real results. There's a community too. Check it out: quantumrealitycodes.com
